pos_sentences.text: Regular activites and regular programs they provide uniforms they have an canteen in the campus
pos_sentences.name: Chethan Chethu

pos_sentences.text: Apart from academics they also concentrate on sports and extra curricural activities
pos_sentences.name: Rakshitha A

pos_sentences.text: Teacher  are very  friendly  with students  .... teacher have kind nature toward  students  ... they reacher many bew things ..
pos_sentences.name: Anonymous

pos_sentences.text: Orientation programes and other such programmes
pos_sentences.name: Hem Sagar

pos_sentences.text: One of the standout features of Seshadripuram College is its huge library, which is well-stocked with a vast collection of books covering all subjects. The library is a valuable resource for students.
pos_sentences.name: Vipul Sharma B

pos_sentences.text: The classrooms are well-equipped with good quality benches.The overall classroom setup is clean, spacious, and conducive to learning.The college  also organizes various intra and inter-college sports competitions&Cultural & Extracurricular activities
pos_sentences.name: Vipul Sharma B

pos_sentences.text: Our college excellent placement opportunities for students, making it one of the top choices for those seeking career prospects right after graduation.Each year, over 50 companies visit the campus to recruit students from various streams.
pos_sentences.name: Vipul Sharma B

pos_sentences.text: They do have many courses provided with PHD.
pos_sentences.name: Preethi Meghanathan

pos_sentences.text: The cultural fest or programs conducted in the college
pos_sentences.name: Anonymous

neg_sentences.text: College doesn't provide parking facilities for students
neg_sentences.name: Arun

neg_sentences.text: The ground is few far from the college about 200 meters
neg_sentences.name: Chethan Chethu

neg_sentences.text: Students are not informed priorly if a lecturer is absent and students are free to leave if a lecturer is not available
neg_sentences.name: Javeriya A

neg_sentences.text: College timings are not good ,it's really difficult to go college at sharp 8am.
neg_sentences.name: Nikita sahoo

neg_sentences.text: Staff behaviour and strict classes without break
neg_sentences.name: Hem Sagar

neg_sentences.text: Cleanliness and hygiene in washroom and canteen
neg_sentences.name: Rakshitha A

neg_sentences.text: A lot of assignments are given before the internal tests
neg_sentences.name: Javeriya A

neg_sentences.text: Fees are charged more than compared to other colleges.

neg_sentences.text: Wanted more teaching courses like forensic that would help us

neg_sentences.text: But they didn't provide placements for everyone equally....
